name: Sun Hung Kai & Co. Limited
summary: Sun Hung Kai & Co. Limited, an investment holding company, provides financial services in Hong Kong and China. The company operates through Consumer Finance, Specialty Finance, Mortgage Loans, Investment Management, and Group Management and Support segments. It offers unsecured loan to individuals and businesses through branches and online platforms; and funding solutions to corporates, investment funds, and high net worth individuals. The company also provides structured and specialty financing; mortgage loan financing; consumer, SME, and other financing; portfolio investments; alternative investments; and liquidity services. In addition, it offers secretarial, financial consultancy, nominee, loan guarantee, money lending, asset management, property investment, securities trading, and fund management services. The company was incorporated in 1969 and is headquartered in Causeway Bay, Hong Kong. Sun Hung Kai & Co. Limited is a subsidiary of AP Emerald Limited.
